hooks.name: Auto Commit After Agent File Changes

action.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$repo = (Get-Location).Path; Set-Location $repo; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; git add -A; $diff = git diff --cached --name-only; if ($diff) { $ts = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; git commit -m \"auto: agent file changes ($ts)\"; git push origin main }"
